item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
took a bit to get around to posting today. keep getting distracted. so the usual. enjoy!
yup.
huh?
@PyroDragon this sound like something you would say
yup.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Pikajane/Princess Etch loredump - 3 year anniversary edition
item.description: I know I brazenly referenced the evil icky TikTok in this video but it's relevant to the story! Once upon a time I taped a big ol CVS-length thermometer to my wall and decided that any revenue I'd earn on TikTok LIVE would go toward the remaining balance of my student debt. I figured it was as good a time as any for that goal because my federal loans were on pause. I had at that time recently rearranged my office which meant there was prime real estate available for the gigundo thermometer, so I threw a video on the internet and expected the journey to take well over a year. What I was not expecting was that the fickle gods of virality would smile down upon me from their algorithmic clouds and bestow the video upon the FYPs of millions of kind souls. The journey began 3-31-22, and ended 3 years ago today - 4/29/22. Since then I created additional streaming thermometers to pay for the computer I'm currently typing from, and the phone for which I filmed all this footage. I received countless hate comments that initially told me what a stupid idea it was, but then when the idea took off the hate comments turned into 20 different iterations of "get a job". I'm grateful to say that I have been a full-time professional Etch A Sketch artist for the last 8+ years - going on 9 this June. It's been a lot of peaks and valleys as freelance tends to be. This video is arguably one of my highest peaks, and one of the brightest jewels in my proverbial crown. Thanks a bunch for reading/watching if you got this far. If you'd like to learn more, here's an interview that shares more about the journey! https://www.cnbc.com/2022/07/28/etch-a-sketch-artist-on-tiktok-jane-labowitch-paid-off-13k-in-student-loans.html Stay tuned for the next episode of the Etch A Sketch color of the day. There might be a bit of a break before the next episode, but in the meantime I hope you enjoyed this pitstop down memory lane. As a final note, if you'd like to support more of my silly videos, I recently launched a new web shop which contains a boatload of Etch A Sketch art! You can check it out here: https://princessetch.bigcartel.com/
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: This is a Stephen Root Appreciation Post
item.description:
The consummate character actor, always a bonus when I see he's in something. I first saw him as part of the ensemble in Newsradio (god what a great show) and so from then on out he was never "that guy," a fate which befalls so many character actors. I loved him in (Left to right from upper left corner) No Country For Old Men, Newsradio, King of the Hill, Dodgeball, Get Out, Office Space, The Ballad of Buster Scruggs, Oh Brother Where Art Thou & Barry.
Like many other actors I love, he's smart about picking projects. Not to say he hasn't improved some otherwise questionable films/shows but a review of some of my favorites overlaps with his IMDB credits pretty well. Here he is in Succession.
And in Boardwalk Empire
And in Bojack Horseman
And in Justified
And in Gravity Falls, and too many more to mention.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday - Transition Selfie 2.5 years
item.description: I started HRT at 32 years old, and given I had a good photo and it's a good milestone and today's tuesday, I figured I'd post it here! I still have a lot of confidence issues, but seeing these photos next to eachother it's also pretty clear to see how far I've come. Definitely super happy to see that. Please excuse the scraggly hair, it's slightly damp :D
item.dc:creator: FoxyEllie

item.title: What Happened Today #88
item.description: This is bullying, not governing. Trump’s team is using federal power to punish anyone they disagree with: immigrants, universities, cities, prosecutors. It is not leadership. It is a flood of cruelty meant to dominate headlines and crush opposition. Lawsuits and rallies are fighting back because there is no other choice. Today’s news shows the real enemy is not policy. It is raw, opportunistic power. There are more than 1,000 May Day protests scheduled for Thursday. You will find something close enough to fit your day, even if it feels like the world is moving on. Meanwhile, don’t rely on social media algorithms. Get this info in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/carney-election 2. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-jenner-block 3. https://go.govbrief.today/assault-suicide-prevention 4. https://go.govbrief.today/novavax-rollout 5. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-law-review 6. https://go.govbrief.today/loomer-schiefler 7. https://go.govbrief.today/civil-rights-attorneys 8. https://go.govbrief.today/truman-jet-houthi 9. https://go.govbrief.today/unions-nonprofits-sue 10. https://go.govbrief.today/sanctuary-cops-orders 11. https://go.govbrief.today/climate-report-authors 12. https://go.govbrief.today/upenn-thomas-trump 13. https://go.govbrief.today/peace-corps-cuts 14. https://go.govbrief.today/asylum-charging 15. https://go.govbrief.today/whitehouse-posters-immigrants 16. https://go.govbrief.today/may-day-mobiliize
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: Our healthcare is not waste, fraud, or abuse. This is.
item.description:
https://gizmodo.com/u-s-loses-60-million-fighter-jet-after-it-slips-off-moving-aircraft-carrier-2000595485#:~:text=Gizmodo%20reached%20out%20to%20the,value%20closer%20to%20%2470%20million.
https://apnews.com/article/aircraft-carrier-fighter-jet-truman-cfeaecc314bfcaf85ce5c30038306ac3 Medicaid sauces: https://www.cms.gov/fraud https://ccf.georgetown.edu/2025/01/27/the-truth-about-waste-and-abuse-in-medicaid/ https://www.cpr.org/2025/02/28/colorado-medicaid-federal-cuts-what-to-know/ "if Congress cuts funding the state will lose more than $1 billion in federal money to cover those Coloradans. It would be one of hardest hit states" “The estimate is about 230,000 additional people would become uninsured, which would be a 50 percent increase in your uninsured rate.” *Edit: Some of you are pointing out how this isn't really a great example of WF&A due to circumstances on the ship. You're right, this isn't the best example of DoD waste. But there are a LOT of examples every year. I've never met an active or retired military personnel who hasn't complained about criminal levels of waste they've seen themselves. Most of the people I've spoken to cite healthcare as an obvious alternative investment, alongside housing vets and other social services. **Edit again: Everyone please consider false binarys in conversation. Absolutely no one has ever said either/or to the DoD and HHS. This discussion is about equity, not defunding. Lastly, benefit of the doubt, if this was a completely innocent accident: 1. The cost of this accident would have settled the Colorado State Education fund for the year or covered insulin for every Coloradan in need for a year. 2. Is it really possible that the richest and most advanced military in the world never considered and made a plan for emergency sharp turns? And if they truly can't or didn't have a procedure, doesn't it seem neglectful to sail a carrier into a combat area that may or may not lose an F18 if it has to dodge a missile? 3. But how are yall just cool with defense waste, but support politicians who say Social Security, Medicare/aid, and public education are fraudulent?
item.dc:creator: currentlywithoutimagination

item.title: LOUDER for the centrists in the back
item.description: Source: https://bsky.app/profile/bencollins.bsky.social/post/3lnxydpu72s2s I apologize for the low effort post, and the lack of proper research to see how much of this was actually said. But god damn it, this is a perfect response to the people who are sitting on the sidelines with the “wait and see” attitude. I’m including some of my own family members who told me to “lay off the criticism and keep a low profile” Fuck you, I’d rather die before taking a knee for this administration. The more we accept this as normal, the more the they dial up the oppression.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars
